query_title: The Bad Guys: Reign of Chaos

recommendations.title: The Yellow Sea
recommendations.overview: A Korean man in China takes an assassination job in South Korea to make money and find his missing wife. But when the job is botched, he is forced to go on the run from the police and the gangsters who paid him.

recommendations.title: The Man Standing Next
recommendations.overview: When the investigation of 'Koreagate' takes place, Park Yong-gak, a former KCIA director who knows everything about the government's operations, heads to the United States in exile.

recommendations.title: The Chaser
recommendations.overview: Joong-ho is a dirty detective turned pimp, who's in financial trouble as several of his girls have recently disappeared without clearing their debts. While trying to track them down, he finds a clue that the vanished girls were all called up by the s

recommendations.title: Unstoppable
recommendations.overview: Dong-chul and Ji-soo are a happily married couple. One day, Dong-chul comes home to find his house in disarray and his wife missing.

recommendations.title: Seoul Station
recommendations.genres: Animation, Horror, Science Fiction, Action, Thriller
recommendations.overview: In this animated prequel to "Train to Busan," a group of survivors deals with a zombie pandemic that unleashes itself in downtown Seoul.

recommendations.title: Spellbound
recommendations.overview: A magician meets a weird girl and offers her to work together in his magic show. It's only until a year later that he starts to know her personally and develops a feeling towards her despite her own problems.

recommendations.title: Peninsula
recommendations.overview: A soldier and his team battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the wastelands of the Korean Peninsula.

recommendations.title: The Drug King
recommendations.overview: Busan, South Korea, 1970s. Lee Doo-sam is a small-time smuggler. After helping a drug gang to smuggle meth, he falls into the dark crime world. Quick-witted and full of ambition, he eventually takes over the drug underworld and starts to lead a doubl

recommendations.title: Train to Busan
recommendations.overview: When a zombie virus pushes Korea into a state of emergency, those trapped on an express train to Busan must fight for their own survival.

recommendations.title: The Dude in Me
recommendations.overview: Dong-hyun is a high school student. One day, he falls from the rooftop and bumps into Pan-soo who is a passerby. Pan-soo is a member of a criminal organization. When the two men wake up in the hospital, they discover that they have switched bodies.
